chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 501 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 Petitioner Abdul Sattar Hisbani present in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Qurban Ali, DSP (Legal) on behalf of DIG Police, Shaheed Benazirabad and Inspector Mir Hashmat Ali on behalf of SSP, Naushahro Feroze >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant Advocate General has filed a statement on behalf of Respondent No.3, which is taken on record. A copy of the same has been provided to the Petitioner, who is present in person before the Court. The police officers present in Court submit that with respect to the arrears of salary claimed by the Petitioner, the process has been initiated and the Petitioner’s case is presently pending before the Director, IT, for further necessary action. In view of the above, we direct the Inspector General of Police, Sindh to look into the matter personally and ensure that the case of the Petitioner regarding arrears of salary is decided strictly in accordance with law within a period of thirty days from the date of this order. The petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. Let a copy of this order be sent to the Inspector General of Police, Sindh, Karachi, for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
